commit.message:
fix: OpenAI voice now works with Anthropic LLM agents

The bug: use_elevenlabs was forced True for all Anthropic agents, but
when OpenAI voice was selected there was no elevenlabs_voice_id, so
elevenlabs_handler stayed None and the AI produced no audio.

Fix: added OpenAITTSHandler class (same interface as ElevenLabsVoiceHandler)
that calls OpenAI TTS-1 API. Voice routing is now:
- Anthropic LLM + ElevenLabs voice → ElevenLabsVoiceHandler
- Anthropic LLM + OpenAI voice     → OpenAITTSHandler (new)
- OpenAI LLM   + ElevenLabs voice  → ElevenLabsVoiceHandler
- OpenAI LLM   + OpenAI voice      → OpenAI Realtime native audio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update build to use howdy-pam instead of howdy-authselect

Drop howdy-authselect RPM dependency. Install howdy-pam script and
systemd path/service units. Remove suspend hook, reenable listener,
and boot-reenable service from the image.

Fix flaky MoltenPsycheTest by replacing non-deterministic assertion

could randomly be drawn back from the library. Replace with a deterministic
library size assertion that proves the hand card was shuffled into the library.

commit.message:
Remove suspend hook, reenable listener, and boot service

These are no longer needed since howdy-pam only patches system-auth.
Howdy never runs during GDM auth, so there's no gnome-keyring conflict
and no need for suspend/resume workarounds.

repository.name: blue-howdy
repository.description: Layering howdy on top of bluefin-dx-nvidia

commit.message:
Add howdy-pam script to manage PAM config for system-auth only

Replace howdy-authselect RPM with our own script that patches
pam_howdy.so into system-auth (sudo/polkit) but NOT password-auth
(GDM). This avoids the howdy + gnome-keyring incompatibility entirely
— GDM always gets a password, so the keyring auto-unlocks at boot
and after suspend without any suspend hook workarounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve MCP server crash and AGE Viewer startup failures

MCP server:
- Replace FastMCP.run(transport="sse", host=..., port=...) with
  uvicorn.run(mcp.sse_app(), ...) — installed SDK version does not
  accept host/port kwargs in run()
- Fix KeyError: register_tools() was extracting state values at
  registration time (before lifespan populated state); now accessed
  lazily at call time

AGE Viewer (docker/age-viewer/):
- Add custom Dockerfile using Node 16 (fixes ||= syntax error on Node 14)
- Use CRACO to exclude weaverjs from babel-loader (fixes infinite
  @babel/traverse recursion on the minified bundle)
- Set DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true (fixes cytoscape/src/util ESLint error)
- Copy sql/15/ → sql/16/ for PostgreSQL 16 compatibility (age-viewer
  ships meta_data.sql for PG 11-15 only)
- Install @babel/runtime explicitly (required by babel-node backend)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: comprehensive activity type mapping for Garmin Connect

- Fix AttributeError bugs: Sport.YOGA, Sport.STRENGTH_TRAINING,
  Sport.DANCING, Sport.MARTIAL_ARTS, SubSport.CROSS_TRAINING don't
  exist in fit-tool — these caused FIT generation to silently fail
- Map all activity types to correct FIT Sport + SubSport pairs:
  yoga→TRAINING/YOGA, weights→TRAINING/STRENGTH_TRAINING,
  pilates→TRAINING/PILATES, hiit→TRAINING/CARDIO_TRAINING,
  indoor_cycling→CYCLING/INDOOR_CYCLING,
  stair_climbing→FITNESS_EQUIPMENT/STAIR_CLIMBING, etc.
- Add 5 new ActivityType enum values: PILATES, HIIT, INDOOR_CYCLING,
  STAIR_CLIMBING, PADDLE_SPORTS
- Expand Fitbit activity ID → type mapping with 30+ additional IDs
  (spin/stationary bike → indoor_cycling, stair climber, bootcamp,
  pilates, paddle sports, racquet sports, etc.)
- Rewrite name-based fallback with specific-first ordering to prevent
  partial-match misclassification
- Update models.py validator to cover all new enum values

  so Google conversions count in KPIs and CRM lead detection

  so Google/TikTok conversions are counted as leads in KPI cards

  cross-platform collisions

commit.message:
feat: Session 464 — L2=10+D4 hyperparams, 10 new signals, 2 promotions, production model

4-season replay validated: 63.4% HR, +470.7u P&L, 12.8% ROI (all 4 profitable).

- Hyperparams: depth 5→4, l2_leaf_reg 3→10 (Session 459 walk-forward winner)
- Promoted: pitcher_on_roll_over (63.2% HR, N=1473), day_game_shadow_over (61.6%, N=895)
- 10 new shadow signals: k_rate_reversion/bounce, umpire_csw_combo, rest_workload_stress,
  low_era_high_k_combo, chase_rate, contact_specialist, humidity, fresh_opponent
- Production model trained: 69.2% HR at edge >= 0.75, all governance gates pass
- Model uploaded to GCS: catboost_mlb_v2_regressor_40f_20250928.cbm
- Supplemental loader: game context (moneyline, game total) from Session 460
- Includes handoff docs from Sessions 460-463

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(analysis): IVIVE calibration deep-dive — uniform factor doesn't work

ML-engineer findings:
- Factor sweep (1x-2000x): Cmax AAFE stays ~4.3 regardless
- With known in-vivo CL: Cmax AAFE 2.52, AUC AAFE 1.98 (both pass <3.0)
- Root cause: ADMET-AI hepatocyte CLint compressed to 2-75 range,
  /5480 conversion destroys signal
- Path forward: direct in-vivo CL prediction via XGBoost + PK-DB data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: add inline comments to 28 most complex 68K modules

Annotated the hardest-to-read assembly across physics (force integration,
drift, steering, braking), collision (boundary probing, binary search
surface tracking), render pipeline (6 entity pipelines, VDP DMA config,
SH2 display init, multi-panel tile rendering), camera (trig smoothing,
drift calc, viewport control, animation), AI (4-band approach ramp,
steering with dead zone), scene (SH2 orchestration, fade state machines),
and sound (FM instrument setup).

Comments focus on algorithms, hardware register semantics, fixed-point
math, COMM protocol handshakes, and non-obvious control flow. ~680 net
new comment lines. Build verified (4MB ROM).

commit.message:
Skip already-pending providers on batch resubmit instead of erroring

When re-running --batch after a partial failure (e.g. Anthropic
succeeded but OpenAI auth failed), skip providers with existing
pending batches and only submit the missing ones. Merges new batch
IDs and metadata into existing state.

commit.message:
Fix Swift compile errors in social features build (#37)

* Fix 6 contract failures: double-wrap and partial user selects

Found via new API contract test script that validates every endpoint
returns the exact JSON shape iOS expects.

Fixes:
- checkins controller: return result.data array (not {data, total})
- restaurants checkins controller: same fix
- comments author hydration: include isPrivate, followerCount,
  followingCount, postCount in select (iOS User model requires them)
- notifications actor hydration: same expanded select
- Add scripts/api-contract-test.ts that logs in, hits every endpoint,
  and validates response shapes match iOS Codable models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Exclude scripts/ from nest build to fix deploy crash

The api-contract-test.ts in scripts/ was being included in the nest
build, causing compilation failure and missing dist/main.js in prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Instagram-level speed, quality, check-in flow & video support

Performance:
- Add Nuke image caching (100MB memory + 300MB disk) with LazyImage
- Add blurhash placeholders for colored loading states
- Enable gzip compression for all API responses
- Add missing DB indexes (post.authorId, notification compound, follow reverse)
- Bump image quality: medium 1080px/q85, thumb 600px/q80, original 2048px/q92
- Add image prefetching for next 5 posts in feed scroll

Check-in flow:
- Restaurant selection is now mandatory for every post
- Rename "New Post" to "Check In" throughout (tab, nav title, buttons)
- Auto-create check-in record linked to post on creation

Video support (10s Reels-style):
- Backend: FFmpeg video processing (transcode to H.264 1080p, extract thumbnail)
- Backend: Accept video MIME types (mp4, quicktime, mov) up to 50MB
- iOS: Video selection from PhotosPicker with auto-thumbnail generation
- iOS: Auto-play muted video in feed with loop and mute toggle
- iOS: HEIC upload support (0.92 quality, fallback JPEG)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add FFmpeg to Dockerfile for video processing in production

The @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg npm package may not work on Alpine's musl libc,
so install system ffmpeg via apk as a reliable fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 3 Xcode build errors: Nuke API and actor isolation

- Remove isDeduplicationEnabled (not in this Nuke version, on by default)
- Simplify LazyImage in RestaurantDetailView to avoid main-actor isolation error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add @MainActor to coverImageSection to fix actor isolation error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Inline cover image LazyImage to fix actor isolation cascade

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 400 error: auto-create restaurant when place has no DB match

PlacePickerView uses Apple Maps (MKLocalSearch) which always returns
restaurantId: nil. Since restaurantId is now required on the backend,
auto-create the restaurant via POST /restaurants before creating the post.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 4 issues: feed crash, video unmute, comments, shimmer placeholders

- Fix durationSecs decimal→string crash by adding TypeORM transformer
- Fix video unmute button swallowed by NavigationLink (.buttonStyle)
- Fix comments not loading: send page/perPage instead of limit param
- Add Instagram-style shimmer loading placeholders for images/video

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add ShimmerView.swift to Xcode project to fix CI build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add multi-image carousel, profile error states, pull-to-refresh, dark mode toggle

- MediaCarouselView: swipeable TabView with page dots for multi-image posts
- PostCardView: replace single image + "+X more" with full carousel
- ProfileView: add .refreshable, error state with retry via EmptyStateView
- AppearanceManager: system/light/dark mode with @AppStorage persistence
- SettingsView: segmented picker for appearance mode
- InvlogApp: wire AppearanceManager with .preferredColorScheme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add social features: bookmarks, share, stories, and DMs

Backend (NestJS):
- BookmarksModule: bookmark/unbookmark posts, list saved posts (cursor paginated)
- StoriesModule: create story from media, 24h expiry feed grouped by user,
  mark viewed, viewer list, delete — with batch author+view hydration
- MessagesModule: conversations (lexicographic participant pair), send messages,
  cursor-paginated message threads, mark-as-read, unread counts
- Register all 3 modules in AppModule; add isBookmarkedByMe to Post entity
- New DB tables: bookmarks, stories, story_views, conversations, messages

iOS (SwiftUI):
- PostCardView: bookmark button (filled/unfilled), share button with ShareSheetView
- BookmarksView + BookmarksViewModel: saved posts list with pagination
- ProfileView: "Saved Posts" navigation link for current user
- StoriesBarView: horizontal avatar scroll with gradient ring (unviewed) at feed top
- StoryViewerView: full-screen viewer with progress bars, tap nav, swipe dismiss
- StoriesViewModel: load story feed, mark as viewed
- ConversationsListView: inbox with avatar, preview, timestamp, unread badge
- MessageThreadView: chat bubbles (blue/gray), text input, 5s polling
- NewConversationView: user search to start DM
- FeedView: stories bar as first section, paperplane toolbar icon → DMs
- 14 new Swift files added to project.pbxproj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- StoriesViewModel: add responseType: [StoryGroup].self to request call
- MessageThreadViewModel: add responseType: Message.self to sendMessage call
- NewConversationView: add responseType to search and startConversation calls
- NewConversationView: replace iOS 17 navigationDestination(item:) with

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add missing logger in decision.py and granular error handling in drone pipeline

NameError on logger.exception() in _call_yandex() was crashing the entire
drone photo pipeline. Each pipeline step (send_pending, compose_alert,
send_confirmed) now has its own try/except so the user always gets a
classification result even when downstream services fail.
